creator: trialero@gmx.com
text:
trying to "/script load twirssi.pl", irssi reported three errors in the twirssi.pl:

there are unescaped '{' in de script, lines 325, 328 and 3244.

after escaping these left braces manually, twirssi.pl runs as expected.

concerns twirssi 2.6.3, installed on 20181008 with pkg
FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p4
